synthesis.based_on: Yemen’s Houthis declare naval blockade against Saudi Arabia amid Strait of Hormuz fighting

takes.yemen s houthis declare naval blockade a: Houthi blockade risks regional supply disruption, adding modest upward pressure on prices.
takes.southeast asian ministers set to call fo: Manila talks signal de-escalation efforts, slightly easing the war-risk premium.
takes.cpc oil loadings suspended again after d: CPC suspension tightens supply, supporting a small bullish price response.
takes.gas prices top 4 a gallon again as u s i: Higher gas prices reflect war-risk spillover, sustaining upward pressure on oil.
takes.us attacks deepen hardship not dissent i: US attacks intensify regional instability, reinforcing upward pressure on oil prices.
